packages.name: Via Stitching
packages.description: Place stitching vias in patterns: grid, staggered/hex, perimeter along Edge.Cuts, or along selected tracks.
packages.description_full: Adds an Action Plugin for pcbnew that fills selected copper zones (or stitches along the board edge or selected tracks) with vias on a configurable pitch. Supports rectangular grids, hexagonal/staggered packing, perimeter (Edge.Cuts) stitching, and along-track stitching. Respects clearance to other-net copper and inherits the selected zone's net by default. Newly placed vias are wrapped in a PCB_GROUP for easy bulk select / delete.
